name: jianghai
description: Jianghai is a leading manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors, offering high-quality capacitive solutions for industrial, automotive, and consumer electronics applications.
longDescription: Jianghai (Nantong Jianghai Capacitor Co., Ltd.) is one of China's largest manufacturers of aluminum electrolytic capacitors. With decades of experience in capacitor technology, Jianghai provides reliable capacitive solutions for power supplies, industrial control, automotive electronics, and consumer applications. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics offers comprehensive Jianghai product selection, technical support, and supply chain services.

coreProducts.name: Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance aluminum electrolytic capacitors for power supply and industrial applications

coreProducts.name: Snap-in Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-capacitance snap-in capacitors for SMPS and industrial power supplies

coreProducts.description: Surface-mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact designs

Technical support from certified FAE team
seoTitle: Jianghai Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors | Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Jianghai aluminum electrolytic capacitors, snap-in capacitors, and SMD capacitors. Technical support, selection guide, and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: What types of capacitors does Jianghai offer?
faqs.answer: Jianghai offers a comprehensive range of aluminum electrolytic capacitors including radial lead capacitors, snap-in capacitors, SMD capacitors, and screw terminal capacitors. They also provide automotive-grade capacitors qualified to AEC-Q200 standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss your specific application requirements. We can help you select the optimal capacitor type based on capacitance, voltage, ripple current, and operating temperature requirements.

faqs.question: Are Jianghai capacitors suitable for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jianghai offers a wide range of AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors specifically designed for automotive applications. These capacitors meet stringent automotive reliability standards and are suitable for onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, and motor drives.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, specify AEC-Q200 qualified parts. Our FAE team can provide automotive-grade capacitor recommendations with full qualification documentation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Jianghai electrolytic capacitors?
faqs.answer: Jianghai electrolytic capacitors offer excellent lifetime performance, typically rated for 2,000 to 20,000 hours at rated temperature. The actual lifetime depends on operating voltage, temperature, and ripple current. Using the lifetime calculation formula, you can estimate expected lifetime for your specific conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: For lifetime-critical applications, provide your operating conditions and our FAE team can calculate expected lifetime using Jianghai's reliability models.

faqs.question: Does Jianghai offer custom capacitor designs?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jianghai provides custom capacitor design services for specialized applications. Custom options include specific capacitance values, voltage ratings, physical dimensions, and special terminal configurations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For custom capacitor requirements, contact our FAE team with your specifications. We can coordinate with Jianghai engineering to develop a custom solution.

faqs.question: What certifications do Jianghai capacitors have?
faqs.answer: Jianghai capacitors carry multiple international certifications including ISO 9001 for quality management, ISO 14001 for environmental management, IATF 16949 for automotive quality, and AEC-Q200 for automotive component qualification. All products are RoHS and REACH compliant.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring specific certifications, specify your requirements when requesting quotes. We can provide certificates of compliance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Jianghai capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right capacitor requires considering several parameters: rated voltage (typically 1.2-1.5x operating voltage), capacitance value, ripple current rating, operating temperature range, physical size constraints, and application-specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application details for personalized capacitor selection assistance.
